Name: Guard
Description: An old guard in rusty armor. He looks like he has been standing here for hundreds of years.

Dialogs.Response: I have stood here for ages. Are you looking for the treasure? Go through the hallway to the north, but beware of traps.
The treasure is hidden in the room to the north. But you need the key that lies in the hallway.
The key? I saw it lying in the hallway. Someone must have dropped it there.
The ancient ones left many traps. Watch your step near pressure plates and loose stones.

Name: Sage
Description: An old man with a long white beard. His eyes shine with wisdom.

Dialogs.Response: Welcome, traveler. Are you seeking the golden chalice? I wish you luck on your journey.
The golden chalice has the power to grant one wish. But many who sought it never returned.
Your journey begins in a small stone room. Continue north and you will find what you seek.
Magic flows through these ancient halls. The crystals in my study can enhance your abilities.

Name: Miner
Description: A weathered miner with a pickaxe, covered in dust from years of digging.

Dialogs.Response: Another adventurer? Be careful down here. The caverns are deep and full of dangers.
These caverns stretch for miles. I've found many treasures but also many terrors.
The underground lake below is peaceful. A fisherman lives there. He knows secrets about these depths.
I've been mining these caves for decades. The gems here are unlike any found on the surface.

Name: Fisherman
Description: A quiet fisherman sitting by the underground lake, patiently waiting for a catch.

Dialogs.Response: Shhh... the fish are biting today. Care to try your luck?
The blind fish in this lake have never seen sunlight. They taste surprisingly good.
This boat has carried many souls across these dark waters. Some never came back.
Between you and me, there's a secret passage behind the treasure chamber. Few know about it.

Name: Ghost
Description: A translucent figure floating in the passage, remnants of an ancient warrior.

Dialogs.Response: Who disturbs my eternal rest? Speak quickly, mortal.
This secret passage was once known only to the high priests. Now it's my domain.
Gold means nothing to the dead. But for you living ones, it seems to mean everything.
I cannot help you directly, but I can warn you: the altar ahead holds great power and great danger.

Name: Priest
Description: A hooded figure chanting prayers at the ancient altar, surrounded by mystical energy.

Dialogs.Response: Blessings upon you, child. You have come far to reach this sacred place.
This altar predates all recorded history. Its runes hold the power of the ancients.
The holy relic upon this altar can heal any wound or curse any enemy. Choose wisely how you use it.
May the ancient ones guide your path. Take this blessing as you continue your quest.
